action.reasoning: Observation: predict.py failed with AttributeError: '_infer' because the loaded handler was created with process_type=PT_R (which populates _data but not _infer) and its end_time was set to 2021-12-31, so it didn't even have the test data. Analysis: To fix this elegantly without duplicating processors or creating new handlers, I will set end_time='2024-01-01' in train.py so the handler loads all data. In predict.py, I will simply alias handler._infer = handler._data so that model.predict can fetch the features correctly. I will also revert to Alpha158's default processors (which include CSRankNorm) as they likely contributed to the best IC in iter 6. Decision: Update train.py and predict.py, run training and local test, and submit for evaluation.
